overview: The system registered 300+ probono cases since the day it was launched.
Backed by 30,000 people including lawyers, legal experts, social workers, and the general public.
Frizhub worked as Justice Project Pakistan's engineering partner and helped them build a modern-day platform where lawyers can advance the conventional modes of client building.
Allowing lawyers to freely accept a case of an accused person who cannot afford financially to fight for it.
Allows Clients to Search and selects the best suitable lawyer for their associated case.
